name: Zoom
description: Join Zoom meetings through Chrome transports.

name.label: Participant Name
name.help: Zoom display name. Defaults to the configured Zoom agent id, then "main".

defaults.meeting.label: Default Meeting
defaults.meeting.help: Zoom URL used when commands omit a meeting.

defaultTransport.label: Default Transport
defaultTransport.help: Chrome uses a local browser profile. Chrome-node runs Chrome on a paired node.

defaultMode.label: Default Mode
defaultMode.help: Realtime voice is the default. Conversation uses native STT/TTS with Zoom-owned VAD.

chrome.audioBackend.label: Chrome Audio Backend
chrome.audioBackend.help: BlackHole 2ch is required for local duplex audio routing.

chrome.reuseExistingTab.label: Reuse Existing Zoom Tab
chrome.reuseExistingTab.help: Avoids opening duplicate tabs for the same Zoom URL.

chrome.autoJoin.label: Auto Join Browser Flow
chrome.autoJoin.help: Best-effort Join from Browser, display-name fill, and Join click through OpenClaw browser automation.

chrome.waitForInCallMs.label: Wait For In-Call (ms)
chrome.waitForInCallMs.help: Waits for Chrome to report that the Zoom tab is in-call before the realtime intro speaks.

chrome.audioInputCommand.label: Audio Input Command
chrome.audioInputCommand.help: Command that writes meeting audio to stdout in chrome.audioFormat.

chrome.audioOutputCommand.label: Audio Output Command
chrome.audioOutputCommand.help: Command that reads assistant audio from stdin in chrome.audioFormat.

chrome.audioFormat.label: Audio Format
chrome.audioFormat.help: Command-pair audio format. PCM16 24 kHz is the default Chrome/Zoom path; G.711 mu-law 8 kHz remains available for legacy command pairs.

conversation.agentId.label: Conversation Agent
conversation.agentId.help: OpenClaw agent id used by native conversation mode. Defaults to realtime.agentId or main.

conversation.instructions.label: Conversation Instructions
conversation.instructions.help: Extra guidance for short native STT/TTS Zoom replies.

conversation.playbackCommand.label: Conversation Playback Command
conversation.playbackCommand.help: Command that plays a synthesized audio file into the Zoom microphone route. Supports {{AudioPath}}.

conversation.vad.rmsThreshold.label: Conversation VAD RMS Threshold
conversation.vad.rmsThreshold.help: RMS level that starts an utterance in native conversation mode.

conversation.vad.silenceMs.label: Conversation Silence Window (ms)
conversation.vad.silenceMs.help: Silence duration that commits an utterance for transcription.

chromeNode.node.label: Chrome Node
chromeNode.node.help: Node id/name/IP that owns Chrome, BlackHole, and SoX for chrome-node transport.

realtime.provider.label: Realtime Provider
realtime.provider.help: Defaults to OpenAI; uses OPENAI_API_KEY when no provider config is set.

realtime.introMessage.label: Realtime Intro Message
realtime.introMessage.help: Spoken once when the realtime bridge is ready. Set to an empty string to join silently.

realtime.agentId.label: Realtime Consult Agent
realtime.agentId.help: OpenClaw agent id used by openclaw_agent_consult. Defaults to "main".

realtime.toolPolicy.label: Realtime Tool Policy
realtime.toolPolicy.help: Safe read-only tools are available by default; owner requests can unlock broader tools.

instructions.default: Reply naturally in one short spoken answer for the Zoom participant.

You are joining a private Zoom meeting as an OpenClaw agent. Keep spoken replies brief and natural. When a question needs deeper reasoning, current information, or tools, call openclaw_agent_consult before answering.

introMessage.default: Say exactly: I'm here and listening.

agentId.description: OpenClaw agent id used by openclaw_agent_consult. Defaults to "main".
